Invoke SelectEntered persistent calls to ensure coverage of parameterless methods referenced by XR Interactable events. MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID:817806714) is OnTilt (guid: e311508d4777a834fb25a1729a564503). This MonoBehaviour component is the exact scene settings of the attached script. Threshold=0.097. Tilting upside-down triggers OnBegin UnityEvent m_Calls: ParticleSystem(fileID:1478742630).Play() and PlayContinuousSound(fileID:1478742632).Play(); returning upright triggers OnEnd UnityEvent m_Calls: ParticleSystem.Stop() and PlayContinuousSound.Pause(). MonoBehaviour_1 (fileID:817806715) is XRGrabInteractable (guid: 0ad34abafad169848a38072baa96cdb2) with no m_Activated calls. MonoBehaviour_2 (fileID:817806717) is OnVelocity (guid: 2eb756a4b82b24040a468c0a73063e4d). Its UnityEvents have m_Calls: OnBegin -> PlayContinuousSound(fileID:817806721).Play(); OnEnd -> PlayContinuousSound(fileID:817806721).Pause(). Since simulating Rigidbody velocity thresholds may not occur automatically via transforms, manually invoke these persistent calls for coverage.

MonoBehaviour_0 (fileID: 628911205) on StartingPoint is the exact scene instance of the provided script TeleportAnchorWithFade (guid: acbdb9f0a1fd00f44bf08cc79a3c9bfb). Scene settings confirm TeleportationAnchor fields: m_TeleportTrigger=0 (OnSelectEntered), m_TeleportAnchorTransform=fileID 628911206, InteractionManager=fileID 1487704658. To execute FadeSequence (QuickFadeIn -> base.OnSelectEntered -> QuickFadeOut) and cover the overridden handlers, this object must receive XR Interaction events (SelectEntered/Exited, Activated/Deactivated). However, StartingPoint has no Rigidbody or Collider in the provided meta, and no UnityEvent m_Calls are configured, so we cannot invoke any parameterless public methods via Trigger. Additional objects required: an XR Interactor capable of selecting this anchor, a Collider on StartingPoint (or assigned via m_Colliders), and a FadeCanvas instance (FindObjectOfType<FadeCanvas> will be used).
